ROW.MESSAGE: Record rejected - Service Report Issue Date cannot be after the submission date.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Date cannot be after the submission date.
Warning - Service Report Issue Date is more than 1 month after the Diagnostic Test Date.

Warning - The Referrer Code is not in a valid format. The value is now being changed to “99 Not Known”. This will cause your whole file to be rejected in the future. Please ensure that the code of Referrer is recorded in this field.
Warning - Diagnostic Test Request Received Date should not be greater than 1 year before the Diagnostic Test Date.
Record rejected - Person Birth Date is not a valid date, in the format `yyyy-MM-dd`.
Warning - General Medical Practice Code was not a live organisation at the relevant point in time (Diagnostic Test Date).
Record rejected - The Person Gender Code is not valid.
Record rejected - Mandatory field Patient Source Setting Type (Diagnostic Imaging) cannot be null.
Warning - Diagnostic Test Request Date should not be greater than 1 year before Diagnostic Test Date.

Record rejected - Duplicate combination of Radiological Accession Number and Site Code (of Imaging) detected; each distinct spell of scanning activity must be represented by a unique accession number and provider site code combination.
Record rejected - Site Code of Imaging is in an invalid format.
Warning - Diagnostic Test Request Received Date should not be greater than 1 year before the Diagnostic Test Date.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Date should be less than or equal to Diagnostic Test Request Received Date.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Received Date should not be before 1970-01-01.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Received Date should not be more than 6 months before the Person Birth Date.
Record rejected - The Imaging Code (NICIP) is an invalid code.
Record rejected - Patient Source Setting Type (Diagnostic Imaging) should be one of the following 01, 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07.
Record rejected - Person Birth Date should be less than or equal to the Diagnostic Test Date.
Record rejected - Site Code of Imaging is in an invalid format.
Record rejected - Person Birth Date is not a valid date, in the format `yyyy-MM-dd`.
Record rejected - The NHS Number is invalid, it should be in line with NHS Number specification and it must satisfy the modulus 11 algorithm.
Record rejected - Mandatory field Radiological Accession Number cannot be null.
Record rejected - No clinical codes provided for either Imaging Code (NICIP) or Imaging Code (SNOMED).
Record rejected - Mandatory field Patient Source Setting Type (Diagnostic Imaging) cannot be null.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Date is not a valid date, in the format `yyyy-MM-dd`.
Record rejected - Person Birth Date should be less than or equal to the Service Report Issue Date.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Received Date should be less than or equal to the Service Report Issue Date.
Record rejected - Person Birth Date cannot be greater than 6 complete months after the Diagnostic Test Request Date.

Record rejected - Duplicate combination of Radiological Accession Number and Site Code (of Imaging) detected; each distinct spell of scanning activity must be represented by a unique accession number and provider site code combination.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Date cannot be greater than 6 months before the beginning of the submission month.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Date should be less than or equal to Diagnostic Test Date.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Received Date is not a valid date, in the format `yyyy-MM-dd`.
Record rejected - The Imaging Code (NICIP) is an invalid code.
Record rejected - Person Birth Date should not be on or before 1900-01-01.
Record rejected - Ethnic Category is invalid, it should be one of the following A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, J, K, L, M, N, P, R, S, Z, 99.
Warning - Site Code of Imaging was not a live organisation at the relevant point in time (Diagnostic Test Date).
Record rejected - The NHS Number Status Indicator Code is invalid, should be one of the following 01, 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07, 08.
Record rejected - Referring Organisation Code is invalid and not present in the reference data.
Warning - Service Report Issue Date is more than 1 month after the Diagnostic Test Date.
Record rejected - Mandatory field Site Code of Imaging cannot be null.
Record rejected - Mandatory field Diagnostic Test Date cannot be null.
Record rejected - Service Report Issue Date should be greater than or equal to the Diagnostic Test Request Date.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Received Date should be less than or equal to the Service Report Issue Date.
Record rejected - Person Birth Date should not be on or before 1900-01-01.
Record rejected - General Medical Practice Code is invalid and not present in the reference data.
Record rejected - The NHS Number Status Indicator Code is invalid, should be one of the following 01, 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07, 08.
Record rejected - Ethnic Category is invalid, it should be one of the following A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, J, K, L, M, N, P, R, S, Z, 99.
Record rejected - Postcode of Usual Address is not a valid postcode in the reference data.
Warning - Referring Organisation Code was not a live organisation at the relevant point in time (Diagnostic Test Request Date if submitted, or Diagnostic Test Date).
Record rejected - Imaging Code (NICIP) does not map to Imaging Code (SNOMED).
Record rejected - The NHS Number has an incorrect data format.
Record rejected - The NHS Number is invalid, it should be in line with NHS Number specification and it must satisfy the modulus 11 algorithm.
Warning - The Imaging Code (NICIP) is now an inactive code. Future submissions of this code will be rejected.
Record rejected - Service Report Issue Date should be greater than or equal to the Diagnostic Test Request Date.
Record rejected - Service Report Issue Date should be greater than or equal to the Diagnostic Test Date.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Received Date should be less than or equal to the Service Report Issue Date.
Record rejected - Ethnic Category is invalid, it should be one of the following A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, J, K, L, M, N, P, R, S, Z, 99.
Record rejected - The NHS Number Status Indicator Code is invalid, should be one of the following 01, 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07, 08.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Date cannot be greater than 6 months before the beginning of the submission month.
Warning - General Medical Practice Code was not a live organisation at the relevant point in time (Diagnostic Test Date).
Record rejected - Postcode of Usual Address has incorrect data format.
Record rejected - Referring Organisation Code is invalid and not present in the reference data.
Record rejected - Radiological Accession Number is an invalid data type.
Record rejected - Mandatory field Site Code of Imaging cannot be null.
Warning - Service Report Issue Date is more than 1 month after the Diagnostic Test Date.
Warning - Referring Organisation Code was not a live organisation at the relevant point in time (Diagnostic Test Request Date if submitted, or Diagnostic Test Date).
Record rejected - Service Report Issue Date cannot be after the submission date.

Record rejected - Failed Personal Demographic Required field Validation. At least one of the following fields is required: Ethnic Category, NHS Number, Person Birth Date, Person Gender Code Current, Postcode of Usual Address, General Medical Practice Code (Patient Registration).
Record rejected - The Imaging Code (SNOMED) is an invalid code.
Record rejected - Site Code of Imaging is invalid and not present in the reference data.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Request Date should be less than or equal to Diagnostic Test Date.
Record rejected - Service Report Issue Date is not a valid date, in the format `yyyy-MM-dd`.
Warning - Referring Organisation Code was not a live organisation at the relevant point in time (Diagnostic Test Request Date if submitted, or Diagnostic Test Date).
Record rejectied - Failed Personal Demographic due to an invalid Postcode of Usual Address.
Record rejected - Service Report Issue Date cannot be after the submission date.
Record rejectied - Failed Personal Demographic due to an invalid Postcode of Usual Address.
Record rejected - Postcode of Usual Address has incorrect data format.
Warning - Diagnostic Test Date should not be greater than 3 months before the beginning of the submission month.
Warning - Service Report Issue Date is more than 1 month after the Diagnostic Test Date.
Warning - The Imaging Code (SNOMED) is now an inactive code. Future submissions of this code will be rejected.
Record rejected - Diagnostic Test Date cannot be greater than 6 months before the beginning of the submission month.
Warning - Diagnostic Test Date should not be greater than 3 months before the beginning of the submission month.
